reviews.review_description: This game is really fun and pretty challenging as well! The level editor is easy to use and the community levels are also great.  Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We are updating the game very soon!

reviews.review_description:
Awesome game, lots of replay ability, cool artstyle, and good modeling. I feel like it’s a little too ‘neon’ though and the tutorials could use a little bit more explanation. Though I understand that the tutorials will likely change over time, as the game is still being worked on and has AMAZING potential. The creators  seem to listen to their fans (with them asking for a jump button and it being added in the form of an item), and it actually runs on my crappy quest 1. Sorta. It runs well enough to have a good time.

I am definitely looking forward to the direction this game goes in!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for your review!

Regarding the tutorials this was also a requested and needed feature, so we are working on a Campaign mode for the next big update, which will explain how things work in the game and also will let you complete little quests in the lobby giving more interaction on this and adding NPCs who will explain things with voice and text in multiple languages

We always look for ways to make most of our players happy.
but for that we need a lot of feedback to improve it, usually, we take feedback on discord 😉

reviews.review_description: What more can I say it’s worth every cent you pay

developer_response.body: Aw thanks a lot! this is just the alpha 👀 a big update will come in 3 parts to launch the Beta officially!

reviews.review_description: An amazing platformer with levels mostly made by the community. Highly recommend it.
9/10 game by the way

developer_response.body:
Hello, thanks for your rating on the game! 😊
Regarding the multiplayer mode, it will be in the works after the Campaign mode release.
Currently, the multiplayer mode is an experimental feature, for using it you need to open the experimental settings inside the menu, then click join a multiplayer room and then type a number and after that, click connect, then your friend has also to do this and type the exact same number you typed and click connect also

Also every time you respawn in the lobby you will need to reconnect to the room

As a reminder, the multiplayer is an experimental feature and many things may not be working yet, this feature will be worked after the next big update which includes campaign mode and better tutorials for everything

reviews.review_title: i love this game you must have it

developer_response.body:
Aww I'm so happy you like it in its current alpha stage!
Currently, the multiplayer part of the game is still experimental, we have big plans for that feature in the future!

reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing hyperstacks for a decent amount of months now. The game is amazing and is a game I always come back to. The community is amazing. This is one of my favorite vr games.
Its still in development but so far it amazing i definitely recommend it i cant wait to see what they add in the future.

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot! we will talk about what's coming in the next update soon!

reviews.review_description: First game on my quest, and a must.

developer_response.body: we are so glad you liked it, thanks a lot for the review!

reviews.review_description: Not really sure where to start, because this game has tons of good elements. I first started to follow this games development after seeing the climbing. I had been a fan of climbing and flinging myself in Vr, and this game does that perfectly. The climbing feels perfect, with tons of challenge and different ways to approach it. Just flinging yourself feels great. That and the other parkour elements like grinding rails creating an awesome experience for smooth climbing and awesome quick movement. That included with this games level editor is why I fell in love with it. Being able to seamlessly create my own levels full of cool climbing and other things I could think up have been awesome. Another awesome element. Is the combat. While I think that it will greatly improve with more enemy variety, as of right now it is still super fun. Dodging and dashing through enemies, ducking and moving irl as you move your hands around to shoot enemies is an awesome feeling. With the level editor, making arena designs and using them is super fun. That included with fun puzzles that you can shape makes the game an awesome time. But to me the most important aspect is how all these things work together. You can make levels with all of these things included, and bring so many things to life. Having made a sonic level with tons of fast paced parkour and interesting ideas that used the idea from the update and even impressed the games creator (hiya extrys) as to how it could be applied. Making a level with combat and small parkour elements set in an underground freezing mineshaft, or levels about breaking the game to its limit. There is so much fun stuff to create, and the game is constantly being updated with awesome stuff and people’s suggestions from the discord. If you wanna hang out with us and talk about the game, check out discord.gg/squirrelbytes. I can’t wait to see more from this game, and what I have been seeing is incredible. TLDR; awesome game with fun parkour, combat, and puzzles that has a level editor that allows you to bring all these things together and your ideas to life

developer_response.body: Thank you PigGamer1468 for all your support!

reviews.review_description: Its not only fun to play, but really really easy to pick up, the level creator is very intuitive to the point where you just need to drag and drop. 100% reccomended!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your review Boske23, we are woking on the second Road To Beta update wich improves furthermore the Level editor, its coming soon i hope you like it when it comes nwn

reviews.review_title: Easily one of the best VR experiences
reviews.review_description: Ive played this game fir many hours, and boy have i had a blast. So much about the game is just so good. The level editor is both intuitive and fun to use and allows for endless amounts of creativity. I have uploaded quite a few levels myself, and still have ideas for more. The gameplay is also amazing. The movement feels fluid and the climbing is responsive and fun. Hands down one of my fave VR games. I cant wait to see where this game goes next!

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot, Redshellmeerkat
We are working so hard to improve the game currently
I'm so happy you like it in its current alpha stage  😊

reviews.review_description: This is an amazing game with a ton of different things to do, you can make your own levels as well as play other people's. It's fun to make levels, and you can tell that the devs are working on and constantly improving the game. There's a WIP multiplayer, and you can even suggest features in their discord server! They've promised a campaign coming soon, which should be a lot of fun. Right now it feels a little bit like Mario Maker VR, but with even more playability! There are going to be many, many features added in the future, as you can see just by looking at the lobby! There are frequent and great updates, each bringing a lot of new content. I love this game, and it fits the quest perfectly. It's definetely worth the price, even if the game isn't completely finished yet.
Very easy to use level editor, amazing puzzle/climbing game, and a very welcoming discord with very active developers that are always adding new updates. (This review was made by Ryan80s)

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot Ryan80s, we are always on discord listening to the community!
also, I have played some of your levels, really really good levels!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games I've ever seen
reviews.review_description:
This game is for almost everyone: action players that love frenetic battles, puzzle solvers who want to think out of the box, speedrunners that find ways to finish a level even faster, level builders who enjoy creating more content to the game itself…
Hyperstacks has a lot to offer, it has so much potential to have a loyal fanbase that provides more and more creative content, unlimited possibilities to satisfy a large number of target audiences. You may not interested in all types of levels created by the community but I'm sure you will interested in Hyperstacks

Game is fun, climbing is fun, swinging is fun
But as of now it needs more polish, more obstacles, more enemies, and gameplay mechanics

developer_response.body:
I'm glad you like it, currently, we are working on features and polishing content 😊
Also, we are open to ideas and feedback, you can drop your ideas in our discord if you want, for us is important to know what people want to be in-game!

reviews.review_description: We have multiplayer but we need more! Which mean we need to see like 10 or more lobby’s to join. Also we need another update lol.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
Yeah we need update the game so we are working a lot on the update 0.9.0, it will bring more NPCs and a lot of new content, will be the greatest update then, after that we will focus on the multiplayer part
